DARV.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-0.a: Got a heavy look about ya. Good thing Darv keeps things that are useful for heavy roads.
DARV.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-1.c: All roads are heavy when they must be walked twice.
Still carrying all that? Here, take somethin' from the pile. No charge today.
I found a cracked old relic that hummed like a confession. Thought it might know you.
If it remembers me, then it remembers what I owe.
Then maybe it oughta help you pay it.
NEOW.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-0.a: [sine]...you return... carrying wounds... not all of them yours...[/sine]
NEOW.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-1.c: Then let me carry them one step farther.
NEOW.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-2.a: [sine]...awaken... penitent... the debt is not yet paid...[/sine]
[sine]...faith... burden... two names for the chain that brings you back...[/sine]
[sine]...again... you climb with ash in your hands...[/sine]
Ash can still mark a door.
[sine]...then mark the Architect... and end what remembers you...[/sine]
Oh, such a careful soul. You polish your cage and call it virtue.
A cage can still hold back what should not be free.
Then wear my gift like a lock turned inward.
Your burden smells sweeter each time you return. Heavy things ripen.
You think pain makes you clean. No, no. Pain makes you [jitter]open[/jitter].
Then we shall see what crawls through first.
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-0: A sinner with rules! Delicious! Do you count the steps before you fall?
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-1: I count them so I can climb back.
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.1-0: Faith, burden, faith, burden. Spin faster! The Spire loves a good rhythm!
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-0: If you drop every weight at once, will you fly or splatter?
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-1: I will not test my soul for your amusement.
OROBAS.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-2: Then test it for mine by surviving!
PAEL.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-0.a: [thinky_dots]Poor pilgrim. Let my flesh take one ache from the many...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-1.c: Mercy given without witness is still mercy.
[thinky_dots]You return thinner, heavier. Rest in the warm place between breaths...[/thinky_dots]
[thinky_dots]You feed the burden, then fear what grows. All flesh does this...[/thinky_dots]
I fear only failing those I meant to heal.
[thinky_dots]Then take what helps your hands remain gentle...[/thinky_dots]
TANX.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-0.a: YOU LOOK LIKE YOU FIGHT YOURSELF EVERY DAY!! GOOD TRAINING!!
TANX.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-1.c: The self is a stubborn enemy.
TANX.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.0-2.a: THEN HIT IT HARDER AND CLIMB!!
YOUR BURDEN IS HEAVY!! GOOD!! HEAVY THINGS MAKE STRONG ARMS!!
NO MORE WHISPERING AT YOUR SINS!! SHOUT AT THEM!!
LOUDER NEXT TIME!! TAKE A WEAPON!!
Oh, dear heart. You keep a ledger in your ribs, don't you?
Every kindness must be accounted for.
Then let Tezcatara burn away one little column.
Back again, sweetie? Still confusing suffering with responsibility?
You would carry a stranger's wound before setting down your own.
That is not virtue. It is practice.
Practice, then. Hold still while I make it hurt less.
A man who believes all power must be paid for. At last, a reasonable customer.
A debt offered by you is a noose.
A noose is only a collar with honest ambitions.
VAKUU.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.1-0r: Your burden appreciates interest. Mine appreciates signatures.
VAKUU.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-0r: The Architect wounded you. I can teach the wound to bite.
VAKUU.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-1r: I will not sell my penance to spite its author.
VAKUU.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENITENT.2-2r: Then borrow, holy man. Borrowing is how selling begins.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.THEPENITENT-THE_PENIT: You built a prison and called it purpose.
And you decorated yours with prayers.
Still climbing? Your suffering has made you obedient.
No. It has made me difficult to kill.
Meaning is what remains after pain fails to empty me.
I have carried enough of your world.
